title: USPS Tracking Number 9468211105495879189517. (University of California, Berkeley)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the California Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

Dear Records Custodian,

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act (5 U.S.C. § 552) and the Privacy Act, I respectfully request all records associated with USPS Tracking Number 9468211105495879189517.

Specifically, I request:

The complete delivery history and tracking scan history;
Any forwarding requests or forwarding actions associated with this item;
The date(s) on which forwarding was initiated or processed;
The forwarding destination address(es);
The identity or designation of the recipient(s) who received the forwarded mail, if available;
Any delivery confirmation records, signatures, internal notes, or related metadata concerning the item.

This request includes all electronically stored information, internal tracking logs, forwarding database entries, and delivery records maintained by USPS regarding this tracking number.

Please provide the requested records in electronic format if possible.

Thank you for your time and assistance.

Sincerely,

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 calendar days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Young Jin Jung
